/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TestRigControl.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TestRigControl.dir/TestRigControl_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestRigControl.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestRigControl.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TestRigControl.dir/src/galilcontroller.cpp.o -o TestRigControl  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 -lgclib -lgclibo /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
